author: gb9t
content: Iter 71 result: drivers/md/dm-integrity.md (per-sector data-integrity - dm-integrity.c ~5475 lines; HMAC-SHA256 tag per-sector + journal-mode write-atomicity + bitmap-mode fast-path + AEAD integration with dm-crypt + range-lock + dm-bufio for tag-area + replay_journal crash-recovery + recalc_thread bg-tag-population) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-pebs.md (Intel PEBS virtualization - in pmu_intel.c; per-vCPU MSR_IA32_PEBS_ENABLE/_DS_AREA/PEBS_DATA_CFG shadows + per-counter PEBS-record relocation from host DS-area to guest DS-area + threshold-triggered PMI delivery + adaptive-PEBS support). 92 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-cache.md (block cache layer) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-lbr.md (Last-Branch-Record virtualization).
